scripts.demo:any:notepad:mock: node dist/apps/runner/src/main.js --target any --mode mock --target-app notepad.exe --task "In Notepad, perform one safe visible UI action." --output artifacts/custom-notepad-smoke
scripts.demo:any:notepad:real: node dist/apps/runner/src/main.js --target any --mode real --target-app notepad.exe --task "In Notepad, make text bold and type HELLO WORLD as a visible action without saving files." --output artifacts/custom-notepad-real
scripts.test:stage2: npm run build && npm run demo:paint -- --output artifacts/stage2-paint && npm run verify:stage2 -- artifacts/stage2-paint
scripts.test:stage3: npm run build && npm run demo:calculator -- --output artifacts/stage3-calculator && npm run verify:stage3 -- artifacts/stage3-calculator
